title: lithocardium peruvianum
intro: Lithocardium peruvianum, also known as the "Peruvian heart plant," is a medicinal plant native to the Andean region of Peru. It is valued for its cardio-tonic and diuretic properties, which help to strengthen the heart and improve blood circulation by reducing inflammation and promoting the removal of excess fluids from the body. The plant is also known for its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of hypertension, making it a popular herbal remedy for cardiovascular health. Lithocardium peruvianum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
